textByHash.3407398c019e752c9fc2a266ccdb9c91584e642b: You can. Take your prize and leave, but when you are ready, return here. The Devourer's thralls will soon be back. You must fight them.
textByHash.83fd5534df15474f30acc115c2abce52d809f804: You fought well. The Devourer's influence here has lessened, but it will soon be restored. It is time for you to leave.
textByHash.b9cbe94229d5fd726c0f84ec83dc25fc0767d6bd: Once, but who I was in life means nothing. Vengeance is all that matters now. The Devourer may be gone, but my home has been corrupted. This corruption must be destroyed.
textByHash.c318ab778ce411c81a7169a6d77dfa5975880395: The Devourer's thralls will be back, but they have been weakened because of you. Now, leave this place.
textByHash.ca4ac5ebe1f855d667301af17c997ae7b22f6b6c: We shall see if it is enough.
textByHash.d1972c83ca0bb8ffa10bf6e19e0de57060213fc9: You have done well, but it is time for you to leave. The Devourer's thralls will soon return.
textByHash.e52ae47ec399ab971cd8055da44c44020a64f299: The Devourer's thralls will be back, but they have been weakened because of you. Your prize awaits.
textByHash.f1e37dd6ba97239aab867cf0fabe9323495690b3: We are done here, but the Devourer's thralls are everywhere. They must be removed.
